name: funcat3
documentation: Using very simple code to compute indicator of stock and crytocurrency. Make quantify easier to everyone. Funcat has transplanted the indicator formulas of THS, Tongdaxin, Wenhua Finance, and other platforms into Python. It is suitable for quantitative analysis and trading of stocks, futures, contracts, and cryptocurrencies.

documentation: def get_specific_borrow_coin(self, instrument_id, status, before, after, limit):

methods.name: funcat.data.okex.spot_api.SpotAPI.take_order
documentation: def get_ledger_record_paging(self, symbol, before, after, limit):
return self._request_with_params(GET, SPOT_LEDGER_RECORD + str(symbol) + '/ledger', params, cursor=True)

methods.name: funcat.data.okex.spot_api.SpotAPI.get_orders_list
documentation: def get_orders_list(self, status, instrument_id, before, after, limit):
params = {'status': status, 'instrument_id': instrument_id, 'before': before, 'after': after, 'limit': limit}

methods.name: funcat.data.okex.ett_api.EttAPI.get_order_list
documentation: def get_order_list(self, status, ett, otype, before, after, limit):
params = {'status': status, 'ett': ett, 'tyoe': otype, 'before': before, 'after': after, 'limit': limit}

methods.name: funcat.data.okex.futures_api.FutureAPI.get_order_list
documentation: def get_order_list(self, status, before, after, limit, instrument_id=''):
params = {'status': status, 'before': before, 'after': after, 'limit': limit, 'instrument_id': instrument_id}

methods.name: funcat.data.okex.futures_api.FutureAPI.get_trades
documentation: def get_trades(self, instrument_id, before, after, limit):
return self._request_with_params(GET, FUTURE_TRADES + str(instrument_id) + '/trades', params, cursor=True)

methods.name: funcat.data.tencent_backend.TencentDataBackend.get_trading_dates
documentation:
获取所有的交易时间戳
tencent api只能获取最近480条记录, 由于交易时间只占全天时间的1/6，所以获取
离end时间最近的4000条时间戳，然后再筛选有效时间戳

```
param start

20210101093000

param end

20210119150000
```

MarketDataSeries
